---
title: "Marie Rivers"
image: "MTR_pic.jpg"
links:
  - label: LinkedIn
    url: "https://linkedin.com/in/marie-rivers-pe-8284b118"
  - label: Twitter
    url: "https://twitter.com/Marie_T_Rivers"
  - label: GitHub
    url: "https://marierivers.github.io"
 
output:
  postcards::jolla
site: distill::distill_website
---
 
I am an environmental data science student at UC Santa Barbara
